description: The Adi Monte Roshes range of lifestyle fitness shoes from adidas is a great sneaker. Stylish to the T, it makes for an excellent casual wear too. offering superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhnaced brethability and extended durabilityPatent three rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure to the shoe and signifying the brand's motto of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitMesh cut-out on the heel cap with adidas logo to enable heat transferPadded collar and tongue for snug comfortSoft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole to provide all-day comfortMidsoleBuilt with Adiprene technology to provide ample cushioning and protect the feet from impactEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortLightly cushioned insole for all-day comfortOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with horizontal flex grooves for added tractionOutsole built with impact guidance system to ensure natural movement of the feet Adiwear outsole for better abrasion resistance and traction when playing hard ground SportsCarbon rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box to protect the forefootWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
